name: Syntax Template And Clause Depth
description: Propose a curated cadence_library addition set for syntax template and clause depth.
related_rules: Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
related_techniques: Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
Parse clause depth per sentence and inject compensating low-depth or high-depth sentences when run limits are exceeded.
Construct paragraphs with excessive clause stacking and ensure clause-depth run caps trigger.
